data.title: Exodus CEO Predicts Bitcoin Price Surge by 2026
data.description: According to Odaily, the CEO of publicly traded company Exodus shared insights during an interview with CNBC, forecasting that Bitcoin's price could reach $200,000 by 2026.

data.title: Trump's Bitcoin, ETH, XRP Reserve Isn't Happening Anymore In 2025, Polymarket Traders Predict
data.description:
Polymarket traders now assign almost zero probability that the Trump administration's proposed national cryptocurrency reserve will become operational in 2025, marking a sharp collapse in confidence after early-year optimism. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/25/12/49235038/trumps-bitcoin-eth-xrp-reserve-isnt-happening-anymore-in-2025-polymarket-traders-predict?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Trump DOJ Wants Terra Founder Do Kwon Behind Bars for 12 Years, Citing SBF Sentence
data.description:

source: https://decrypt.co/351106/trump-doj-wants-terra-founder-do-kwon-behind-bars-12-years-sbf

data.title: Fed’s preferred inflation gauge posts 2.8% core reading, below forecasts
data.description:
The Fed’s go-to inflation tracker dropped more than expected in September, putting more heat on rate-cut bets ahead of next week’s policy call. The Commerce Department said Friday that core PCE, which leaves out food and energy, went up 0. 2% on the month and 2. 8% year over year. That yearly reading slipped from 2. 9% in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/feds-preferred-inflation-gauge-hits-2-8/

data.title: Polymarket’s Pivot Toward “Being the House” Sparks Trust and Ethics Concerns
data.description:
Polymarket’s reported plan to build a market-making desk that trades against users is sparking concerns over ethics, trust, and the platform’s long-held identity.

The post Polymarket’s Pivot Toward “Being the House” Sparks Trust and Ethics Concerns first appeared on Ecoinimist.
